title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Indian Tolls 1[(Army and Air Force)] Act, 1901; 2[(2) It extends to the whole of India 3***.] (3) It shall come into force on the first day of April, 1901.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 14 of 1942, s. 2, for "(Army)". 2. Subs. by the A.O. 1950 for sub-section (2). 3. The words "except Part B States" omitted by Act 3 of 1951. s. 3 and the Schedule.
